rootCause: The Playwright setup path rebuilt Astro via frontend/scripts/setup-test-env.js without regenerating frontend/src/generated/build_meta.json, so /build-meta.json returned HTTP 503 and nav-route smoke failed with a console resource error on /chat.
resolution: Updated frontend/scripts/setup-test-env.js to run scripts/write-build-meta.mjs before ensureAstroBuild(), ensuring runtime build metadata is present for preview-based E2E runs.
